Premium Services

Our Services

From window tinting to full detailing packages, we provide premium automotive services tailored to your needs.

Window Tinting

Premium ceramic and carbon tint films that block UV rays, reduce heat, and enhance privacy while looking sleek.

  • UV Protection
  • Heat Reduction
  • Privacy Enhancement
  • Lifetime Warranty
$199

Ceramic Coating

Long-lasting paint protection with hydrophobic technology. Your paint stays showroom-new with minimal maintenance.

  • 5-Year Protection
  • Hydrophobic Finish
  • Chemical Resistance
  • Deep Gloss
$799

Paint Protection Film

Self-healing clear bra that protects against rock chips, scratches, and road debris. Invisible protection.

  • Self-Healing
  • Rock Chip Protection
  • Stain Resistant
  • Invisible Finish
$1,199

Full Detail Package

Complete interior and exterior restoration. Paint correction, leather treatment, and engine bay detailing.

  • Paint Correction
  • Interior Deep Clean
  • Engine Bay Detail
  • Leather Treatment
$349

Interior Detailing

Deep cleaning of carpets, seats, and surfaces. Leather conditioning and odor elimination included.

  • Steam Cleaning
  • Odor Removal
  • Stain Treatment
  • UV Protection
$149

Windshield Repair

Professional chip and crack repair to restore visibility and prevent further damage. Quick same-day service.

  • Same-Day Service
  • Chip Repair
  • Crack Repair
  • Insurance Approved
$89

Customer Reviews

What Our Customers Say

Real reviews from real customers in Westland, MI.

"Guss and Employees Did a Great Job on My 1 Half Old Truck with Detailing the inside of the truck and Ceramic coating wax. My Truck is Better Than When It was Brand New. I Give His Team more than 5 Star!"

S

Scott

• Ceramic Coating & Detailing

"Great pricing for amazing work, had my car looking brand new again! Best car detailing place in Westland!"

H

Happy Customer

• Full Detail

"Gus is the best thank you. Amazing service! The owner is friendly and kind, and the shop is reliable for window tints and detailing."

V

Verified Customer

• Window Tinting

"Outstanding quality of work! The detailing service leaves cars looking brand new, even if they are older models. Same-day appointments available!"

R

Regular Customer

• Interior Detailing
How It Works

Our Process

Simple, transparent, and professional service from start to finish.

01

Book Online

Schedule your appointment through our easy online booking system or give us a call.

02

Drop Off

Bring your vehicle to our Westland location at 38505 Ford Rd. We offer flexible drop-off times.

03

We Work

Our expert team meticulously details your vehicle using premium products and techniques.

04

Drive Happy

Pick up your transformed vehicle and enjoy that new car feeling!

Get In Touch

Ready to Transform Your Vehicle?

Get a free quote or book your appointment today. Walk-ins welcome!
